titleZh: 指导案例148号：高光诉三亚天通国际酒店有限公司、海南博超房地产开发有限公司等第三人撤销之诉案
titleEn: Guiding Case No. 148: Gao Guang v. Sanya Tiantong International Hotel Co., Ltd. et al.
holdingZh: 公司股东对公司与他人之间生效裁判通常仅具有间接利益关系，不因股东身份当然取得第三人撤销之诉的原告资格。
holdingEn: A company shareholder ordinarily has only an indirect interest in an effective judgment between the company and a third party, and shareholder status alone does not confer standing to bring a third-party revocation action.
